title: CarDekho & CarTrade Used Cars Scraper Output
description: Structured Indian used-car listing records with sources, search and city queries, listing IDs, titles, make, model, year, prices, kilometres driven, fuel type, transmission, body type, ownership, locations, image URLs, listing URLs, and scraped timestamps.

results.title: Used car listing records
